caption: A man with a shaved head stands on a stage in front of a dark blue backdrop. He is wearing a blue t-shirt with the word "Ekiel" printed on the chest and a white lanyard around his neck. He stands with his arms crossed over his chest, maintaining a neutral expression and facing forward. The background features repeating logos and text, including "### rootconf" and "has geek" in light blue and white. A black podium is positioned to his left. Throughout the sequence, the man remains stationary in the same pose, and the lighting and setting stay consistent. The only slight variation is in his facial expression and head positioning as he looks toward the audience.
